title: selaginella borealis
intro: Selaginella borealis, also known as Northern Spikemoss, is a type of ancient, vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella borealis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
